_comment: Expected outcomes for suite_test.py trials. Used by score_suite.py.

_schema.answer_contains: list[str] | null — answer passes if ANY item is a substring of the actual answer (case-insensitive); null means the goal is navigational and no specific answer value is expected
_schema.result_url_contains: str | null — expected substring in the result URL; null means not checked

python_tutorial_page.note: docs.python.org/3/tutorial/ or equivalent beginner tutorial page

python_pep_index.note: peps.python.org or python.org/dev/peps — the PEP index

lz_zen_author.note: PEP 20 (Zen of Python) was authored by Tim Peters

lz_pep8_title.note: PEP 8 title is 'Style Guide for Python Code'

lz_iana_root_count.note: There are 13 root name server operators (a through m .root-servers.net)

python_json_parse_fn.note: json.loads() is the function for parsing a JSON string in Python

mh_functools_cache.note: functools.cache (or lru_cache) memoizes function return values
